meaning: n.冒险故事,浪漫史,传奇文学,风流韵事,虚构vi.写传奇,渲染,虚构
examples: The movie mixes broad humor with romance.
Romance is making a comeback. Reality is out.
More recently, a heartbroken Colin Firth retreated to a house near Vidauban in the 2003 romance Love Actually.
Midlife romance can be like trying to do the tango without ever taking a lesson.
